# unifi_devices (Data Source)

All adopted UniFi devices on the site. Use it to resolve an AP's UUID for a unifi_wifi_broadcast broadcasting_device_filter.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List adopted devices, e.g. to resolve an AP's UUID for SSID targeting.
data "unifi_devices" "all" {}

output "access_points" {
  value = [for d in data.unifi_devices.all.devices : "${d.name} (${d.model}) = ${d.id}"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `devices` (Attributes List) The adopted devices. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--devices))

<a id="nestedatt--devices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `devices`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Device UUID.
- `ip_address` (String) Current IP address.
- `mac_address` (String) MAC address.
- `model` (String) Hardware model.
- `name` (String) Device name.
- `state` (String) Adoption/connection state (e.g. ONLINE, OFFLINE).
